OptionDescription.SourceString: If the emote is being added, this determines if the category the emote is being added to will be the only available category. If it is exclusive, players will only be able to use the emotes in this category when the device is enabled.
OptionDescription.LocalizedString: If the emote is being added, this determines if the category the emote is being added to will be the only available category. If it is exclusive, players will only be able to use the emotes in this category when the device is enabled.
